notes: Swin-T DINO trained 50 epochs on 50-image synthetic dev subset (30 streaked, 20 blank), 256x256px, CPU.
Eval uses axis-aligned bbox IoU (DINO outputs bboxes; Radon OBB refinement skipped in fast mode).
Per-band thresholds (150/400px) do not apply to 256x256 images — max possible streak is ~140px diagonal.
YOLO baseline: 0 detections after 50 epochs — 'no labels found in obb set' during training indicates label-path issue; YOLO baseline result is not valid.
Angle error (29.6deg) reflects bbox aspect-ratio estimation only, not Radon-refined angles.
Phase 8 targets (precision>=0.94, recall>=0.97) require cloud Swin-L training on full-resolution dataset.
device: cpu (MPS unsupported for DINO multi-scale deformable attention)

per_band.note: Thresholds 150/400px not meaningful for 256x256 training images (max ~140px streak length)

yolo_baseline.note: YOLO training failed silently — label files were correct but YOLO reported no labels found; needs investigation
